questionHtml:
A sound wave has a wavelength of 0.20 m. What is the phase difference between two points along the wave which are 0.85 m apart?

A.     zero

B.     45°

C.     90°

D.     180°

meta.title: A sound wave has a wavelength of 0.20 m. What is the phase difference between two points along the wave which are 0.85 m apart? A. zero B. 45° C. 90° D. 180°
